title: Four Flights to Love
writer: Joseph Than, Steve Passeur, Abel Gance
actors: Fernand Gravey, Elvire Popesco, André Alerme
plot: Before World War I in Paris, a budding artist, Pierre Leblanc, falls in love and marries Janine, a dressmaker's assistant. Pierre has a flair for designing clothes, and he and his bride live in a blissful paradise, until war break...
